sql_array: CREATE TABLE dim_vectors (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, vector1 LIST[DOUBLE], vector2 LIST[DOUBLE], description TEXT);
INSERT INTO dim_vectors VALUES (2, [4.0, NULL, 5.0], [5.0, 5.0, 6.0], 'Sample vectors 2');
SELECT id, list_cosine_distance(~vector1, vector2) AS distance FROM dim_vectors WHERE vector1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, list_cosine_distance(vector1, vector2) AS distance FROM dim_vectors WHERE distance = 0.5;
SELECT id, list_cosine_distance(vector1, vector2) AS distance FROM dim_vectors WHERE distance IS NOT NULL HAVING distance < 0.5;
SELECT id, (SELECT ~list_cosine_distance(vector1, vector2) FROM dim_vectors d WHERE d.id = dim_vectors.id) AS negated_distance FROM dim_vectors;
CREATE TABLE temp_vectors AS SELECT id, vector1, vector2, list_cosine_distance(vector1, vector2) AS cosine_dist FROM dim_vectors;
SELECT AVG(~cosine_dist) FROM temp_vectors GROUP BY id HAVING AVG(~cosine_dist) IS NOT NULL;
